Title: Registration
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Tap on "Register" button
3. Enter user details
4. Tap on "Register" button
Expected Result: User is registered and can log in

Title: Login
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Tap on "Login" button
3. Enter email and password
4. Tap on "Login" button
Expected Result: User is logged in and can access the application

Title: Check if the app can be installed on devices with enough storage space
Preconditions: User has the app APK file and the device has enough storage space.
Test Data: APK file of the app, device with storage space less than the app size.
Test Steps:
1. Install the app APK file on the device.
2. Check if the installation is successful.
Expected Result: The app should be installed successfully if the device has enough storage space.

Title: Check if the app consumes too much battery
Preconditions: User has the app installed and the device is connected to a power source.
Test Steps:
1. Start the app on the device.
2. Monitor the battery level while the app is running.
3. Repeat the test with different battery levels.
Expected Result: The app should not consume too much battery.
